# Moloco Design System

> Internal design system for the Moloco ad-tech platform. React + TypeScript. Components use the MC prefix and are split between `@moloco/moloco-cloud-react-ui` (primitives) and `@msm-portal/common/component/...` (app-level composites).

## Components

All components use the MC prefix. Formik-bound form inputs require a `FormikHarness` provider.

### Form Inputs (Formik-bound — require FormikHarness)
- **MCFormTextInput** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/v1/input/MCFormTextInput` — Single-line text input with Formik binding
- **MCFormTextArea** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/v1/input/MCFormTextArea` — Multi-line text input with Formik binding
- **MCFormNumberInput** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/v1/input/MCFormNumberInput` — Numeric input with Formik binding
- **MCFormCheckBox** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/v1/checkbox/MCFormCheckBox` — Checkbox with Formik binding
- **MCFormSwitchInput** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/v1/input/MCFormSwitchInput` — Toggle switch with Formik binding
- **MCFormRadioGroup** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/v1/radio/MCFormRadioGroup` — Radio button group with Formik binding
- **MCFormSingleRichSelect** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/v1/select/MCFormSingleRichSelect` — Single-select dropdown with Formik binding
- **MCFormMultiRichSelect** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/v1/select/MCFormMultiRichSelect` — Multi-select dropdown with Formik binding
- **MCFormCardSelect** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/v1/select/MCFormCardSelect` — Card-based visual selector with Formik binding
- **MCFormInlineChipRichSelect** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/v1/select/MCFormInlineChipRichSelect` — Chip-style multi-select with Formik binding
- **MCFormDateRangePicker** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/v1/input/MCFormDateRangePicker` — Date range picker with Formik binding
- **MCFormDateTimeRangePicker** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/v1/input/MCFormDateTimeRangePicker` — DateTime range picker with Formik binding
- **MCFormColorInput** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/v1/input/MCFormColorInput` — Color picker input with Formik binding
- **MCFormChipInput** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/v1/input/MCFormChipInput` — Tag/chip input with Formik binding
- **MCFormWeeklyTimeTablePicker** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/v1/input/MCFormWeeklyTimeTablePicker` — Weekly schedule picker with Formik binding
- **MCFormOptionalFrequencyInput** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/v1/input/MCFormOptionalFrequencyInput` — Optional frequency input with Formik binding
- **MCFormSkippableVideoInput** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/v1/input/MCFormSkippableVideoInput` — Video skip time input with Formik binding

### Form Standalone (no Formik)
- **MCRadioGroup** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/v1/radio/MCRadioGroup` — Standalone radio group without Formik binding
- **MCColorPicker** — `@msm-portal/common/component/color/MCColorPicker` — Standalone popover color picker
- **MCI18nWeeklyTimeTablePicker** — `@msm-portal/common/component/weekly-time-table-picker/MCI18nWeeklyTimeTablePicker` — Localized weekly schedule picker
- **MCSingleTextInput** — `@moloco/moloco-cloud-react-ui` — Raw text input without Formik
- **MCSingleTextArea** — `@moloco/moloco-cloud-react-ui` — Raw textarea without Formik
- **MCSingleNumberInput** — `@moloco/moloco-cloud-react-ui` — Raw number input without Formik
- **MCDebounceInput** — `@moloco/moloco-cloud-react-ui` — Debounced text input

### Form Layout & Structure
- **MCFormFieldLabel** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/shared/MCFormFieldLabel` — Form field label with tooltip support
- **MCFormTooltip** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/shared/MCFormTooltip` — Markdown tooltip for form fields
- **MCCollapsibleFormFieldGroup** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/collapsible-field/MCCollapsibleFormFieldGroup` — Expandable form field group
- **MCFormAccordion** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/shared/MCFormAccordion` — Formik-aware accordion for form sections
- **MCFormPanel** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/shared` — Container panel for form sections
- **MCFormPanelTitle** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/shared` — Title heading inside MCFormPanel
- **MCFormPanelBody** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/shared` — Body container inside MCFormPanel
- **MCFormFieldGroup** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/shared` — Groups related form fields with spacing
- **MCFormField** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/shared` — Wrapper for individual form fields
- **MCFormTitle** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/shared` — Top-level form page title
- **MCFormBody** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/shared` — Main body container for form panels
- **MCFormActions** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/shared` — Action bar with submit/cancel buttons
- **MCFormFieldError** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/shared` — Inline validation error message
- **MCFormHint** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/shared` — Helper text below a form field
- **MCFormGuideMessage** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/shared` — Informational message in form panel
- **MCFormDescription** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/shared` — Description text below field label
- **MCFormPortal** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/portal/MCFormPortal` — Portal surface for full-screen or overlay form content
- **MCFormLayout** — `@msm-portal/common/component/form/layout/MCFormLayout` — Full form page layout with header and body

### Buttons & Actions
- **MCButton2** — `@moloco/moloco-cloud-react-ui` — Primary action button with variants (use this, not MCButton)
- **MCMoreActionsButton** — `@msm-portal/common/component/button/MCMoreActionsButton` — Dropdown menu for additional actions
- **MCMoreActionGroupsButton** — `@msm-portal/common/component/button/MCMoreActionGroupsButton` — Grouped dropdown actions menu
- **MCButton** — `@moloco/moloco-cloud-react-ui` — Base Moloco UI button primitive (prefer MCButton2)

### Navigation & Layout
- **MCCollapsibleNavbar** — `@msm-portal/common/component/navbar/MCCollapsibleNavbar` — Collapsible left navigation sidebar
- **MCNavbarItems** — `@msm-portal/common/component/navbar/MCNavbarItems` — Navigation menu item list
- **MCProfileButton** — `@msm-portal/common/component/layout/header/user-popover/MCProfileButton` — User account menu button for the app header
- **MCWorkplaceSelectorPopper** — `@msm-portal/common/component/layout/header/workplace-selector/MCWorkplaceSelectorPopper` — Header workplace switcher
- **MCWorkplaceSelector** — `@msm-portal/common/component/auth/workplace-selector/MCWorkplaceSelector` — Searchable workplace selection list
- **MCContentLayout** — `@msm-portal/common/component/layout/content/MCContentLayout` — Page content layout with header/tabs
- **MCBarTabs** — `@msm-portal/common/component/tab/bar-tab/MCBarTabs` — Horizontal tab navigation bar

### Overlays & Feedback
- **MCCommonDialog** — `@msm-portal/common/component/dialog/common-dialog/MCCommonDialog` — Modal dialog with customizable content
- **MCConfirmDialog** — `@moloco/moloco-cloud-react-ui` — Confirmation dialog with yes/no
- **MCPopover** — `@msm-portal/common/component/popover/MCPopover` — Floating popover anchored to trigger
- **MCBanner** — `@moloco/moloco-cloud-react-ui` — Full-width banner notification
- **MCCircularLoader** — `@moloco/moloco-cloud-react-ui` — Circular loading spinner

### Display & Data
- **MCReportTable** — `@msm-portal/common/component/report-table` — Data table for report/list pages
- **MCI18nTable** — `@msm-portal/common/component/table/i18n/MCI18nTable` — Localized table wrapper with shared labels
- **MCTableActionBar** — `@msm-portal/common/component/table/action-bar/MCTableActionBar` — Action bar for table pages
- **MCAccordion** — `@msm-portal/common/component/accordion/MCAccordion` — Expandable/collapsible content section
- **MCDivider** — `@msm-portal/common/component/divider/MCDivider` — Horizontal or vertical separator line
- **MCStatus** — `@msm-portal/common/component/status/MCStatus` — Status badge with semantic colors
- **MCStatusBadge** — `@msm-portal/common/component/status-badge/MCStatusBadge` — Compact status pill with explicit label
- **MCStepper** — `@moloco/moloco-cloud-react-ui` — Multi-step progress indicator
- **MCTimer** — `@msm-portal/common/component/timer/MCTimer` — Countdown timer helper component

### Primitives (from @moloco/moloco-cloud-react-ui)
- **MCIcon** — SVG icon from Moloco icon set
- **MCStack** — Flex-based horizontal/vertical layout
- **MCTextEllipsis** — Text with ellipsis overflow
- **MCMarkdownTooltip** — Tooltip with Markdown content
- **MCMarkdown** — Markdown content renderer
- **MCSearchBar** — Search input with filtering
- **MCTag** — Small label tag component
- **MCChip** — Small chip/badge element
- **MCDataTable** — Low-level data table primitive
- **MCBoxTab** — Box-style tab component
- **MCCollapse** — Collapsible content wrapper
- **MCFilter** — Filter component with options
- **MCDynamicDropdown** — Dynamic dropdown menu
- **MCStateIcon** — State-dependent icon display
- **MCPopper** — Low-level positioning utility
- **MCTimePicker** — Time picker component

### Auth
- **MCSignInForm** — `@msm-portal/common/component/auth/form/sign-in/MCSignInForm` — Portal sign-in form
- **MCTFAForm** — `@msm-portal/common/component/auth/form/sign-in/MCTFAForm` — Two-factor verification form
- **MCForgotPasswordForm** — `@msm-portal/common/component/auth/form/forgot-password/MCForgotPasswordForm` — Forgot-password request form
- **MCPostForgotPassword** — `@msm-portal/common/component/auth/form/forgot-password/MCPostForgotPassword` — Post-reset-request confirmation screen

### Ad Pacing Dashboard
- **MCAdPacingDashboardConfigurator** — `@msm-portal/common/component/ad-pacing-dashboard/MCAdPacingDashboardConfigurator` — Top configuration bar for ad pacing dashboard
- **MCAdPacingDashboardColumnConfigurator** — `@msm-portal/common/component/ad-pacing-dashboard/MCAdPacingDashboardColumnConfigurator` — Column settings panel for ad pacing dashboard
- **MCAdPacingDashboardTable** — `@msm-portal/common/component/ad-pacing-dashboard/MCAdPacingDashboardTable` — Ad pacing dashboard table

### Deprecated (do not use)
- **MCLoader** — DEPRECATED, use MCCircularLoader
- **MCSelect** — DEPRECATED, use MCFormSingleRichSelect
- **MCDatePicker** — DEPRECATED, use MCFormDateRangePicker
- **MCModal** — DEPRECATED, use MCCommonDialog
- **MCBarTab / MCBarTabIndicator** — DEPRECATED internal sub-components
- **EmptyState** — DEPRECATED, use MCEmptyState

## Design Tokens

### Colors
Access via `theme.mcui.palette.{category}.{role}`. Use semantic tokens — never raw hex values.

The 9 semantic roles: **neutral**, **brand**, **danger**, **success**, **warning**, **information**, **disabled**, **inverse**, **grey/blueGrey**

#### Text tokens
| Token name | Palette path | Hex | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| text.neutral.default | theme.mcui.palette.content.primary | #212121 | Default body text, main content |
| text.neutral.subtle | theme.mcui.palette.content.secondary | #5D5D5D | Labels, hints, subdued text |
| text.brand | theme.mcui.palette.content.contentAccent | #346bea | Links, clickable text, brand actions |
| text.danger.default | theme.mcui.palette.content.negative | #dd1f11 | Error messages, destructive action text |
| text.success.default | theme.mcui.palette.content.positive | #429746 | Success messages, positive status text |
| text.warning.default | theme.mcui.palette.content.warning | #ffca28 | Warning messages, caution text |
| text.information.default | theme.mcui.palette.content.informative | #0288D1 | Informational messages, help text |
| text.disabled | theme.mcui.palette.content.disabled | #9E9E9E | Disabled text, placeholder text |
| text.inverse | theme.mcui.palette.content.inversePrimary | #FFFFFF | Text on dark/colored backgrounds |

#### Background tokens
| Token name | Palette path | Hex | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| bg.neutral | theme.mcui.palette.background.primary | #FFFFFF | Main surface, panels, headers, popovers |
| bg.neutral.subtle | theme.mcui.palette.background.secondary | #F8F8F8 | Elevated surfaces, secondary backgrounds |
| bg.brand | theme.mcui.palette.foundation.assent | #346bea | Brand/primary action backgrounds |
| bg.danger.default | theme.mcui.palette.background.negative | #ffeae9 | Error/danger background |
| bg.danger.bold | theme.mcui.palette.foundation.negative | #dd1f11 | Destructive buttons |
| bg.success.default | theme.mcui.palette.background.positive | #E8F5E9 | Success background |
| bg.success.bold | theme.mcui.palette.foundation.positive | #429746 | Bold success background |
| bg.warning.default | theme.mcui.palette.background.warning | #ffebad | Warning background |
| bg.information.default | theme.mcui.palette.background.informative | #E1F5FE | Info background |
| bg.disabled | theme.mcui.palette.background.disabled | #F5F5F5 | Disabled element backgrounds |
| bg.selected | theme.mcui.palette.background.selected | #E3F2FD | Selected item background |

#### Border tokens
| Token name | Palette path | Hex | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| border.neutral.default | theme.mcui.palette.border.primary | #ececec | Standard borders, dividers, panel borders |
| border.brand.default | theme.mcui.palette.foundation.assent | #346bea | Focus rings, active state borders |
| border.danger.default | theme.mcui.palette.foundation.negative | #dd1f11 | Error state borders on inputs |
| border.disabled | theme.mcui.palette.border.disabled | #E0E0E0 | Disabled element borders |

#### Icon tokens
| Token name | Palette path | Hex | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| icon.neutral | theme.mcui.palette.icon.primary | #8891a7 | Default icon color |
| icon.neutral.subtle | theme.mcui.palette.icon.secondary | #5d5d5d | Subdued icons, secondary actions |
| icon.brand | theme.mcui.palette.icon.accent | #346bea | Brand/accent icons, active/selected state |
| icon.danger | theme.mcui.palette.icon.critical | #dd1f11 | Critical/error icons |
| icon.inverse | theme.mcui.palette.icon.inversePrimary | #FFFFFF | Icons on dark/colored backgrounds |

### Spacing
Base unit: 8px. Access via `theme.mcui.spacing(n)`.

| Multiplier | px | Usage | Category |
|---|---|---|---|
| 0.5x | 4px | Tight gap between icon and text | inline |
| 1x | 8px | Inner padding small, icon gaps | inline |
| 1.5x | 12px | Form field gap, small padding | inset |
| 2x | 16px | Standard padding, row gaps | inset |
| 3x | 24px | Section margin-bottom | stack |
| 4x | 32px | Large section gaps, form action padding | stack |
| 5x | 40px | Form title margin | layout |
| 6x | 48px | Panel padding (MCFormPanel) | layout |
| 8x | 64px | Extra-large layout spacing | layout |

### Typography
Access via `theme.mcui.typography.{name}`.

| Name | Size | Weight | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| H_1 | 34px | 400 | Dashboard number. Largest display text. |
| H_2 | 28px | 400 | Page title |
| H_3 | 18px | 500 | Section title, panel titles (MCFormPanelTitle) |
| H_4 | 16px | 500 | Sub-section headings |
| H_5 | 14px | 700 | Selected menu, bold labels (SCBoldLabel) |
| BUTTON_DEFAULT | 14px | 500 | Default button text |
| BUTTON_SMALL | 12px | 500 | Small button text |
| BODY_1_BODY | 14px | 400 | Standard body text, form field labels |
| BODY_2 | 12px | 400 | Secondary text, hints (MCFormHint) |
| BODY_2_SPECIAL | 12px | 400 | Table body, LNB, error messages (MCFormFieldError) |
| BODY_3 | 12px | 500 | Small text, captions, group labels |
| BODY_4 | 10px | 500 | Extra small text, micro labels |

### Border Radius
| Name | Value | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| radius.small | 2px | Panels (MCFormPanel), guide messages |
| radius.default | 4px | Buttons, inputs, popovers, cards |
| radius.large | 8px | Dialogs, large cards, modals |
| radius.circle | 50% | Avatars, status dots, round buttons |

## Patterns

| Pattern ID | Name | When to use |
|---|---|---|
| form-basic | Basic Form Pattern | Any form that collects user input |
| form-full-page | Full-Page Form Pattern | Creating or editing entities that need their own page (campaigns, ads, etc.) |
| styled-component | Styled Component Pattern | Always use styled-components with theme tokens — never hardcode values or use inline styles |
| action-button | Action Button Pattern | Table rows or list items need contextual actions |
| delete-confirm-dialog | Delete Confirmation Dialog Pattern | Standard confirmation dialog for destructive actions |
| field-layout | Field Layout Pattern | Controlling field width and group direction |
| tab-navigation | Tab Navigation Pattern | Tab-based content switching within a page |
| trpc-data-fetching | tRPC Data Fetching Pattern | Type-safe data fetching with tRPC and TanStack React Query |
| provider-stack | Provider Stack | Full provider hierarchy at app root (order matters) |
| list-page | List Page Pattern | Building a page that lists entities with tabs and a create button |
| detail-page | Detail Page Pattern | Building a page that shows entity details fetched from API |
| create-page | Create Page Pattern | Building a page to create a new entity |
| page-container-component | Page → Container → Component Architecture | Every new feature MUST follow this pattern |
| edit-page | Edit Page Pattern | Building a page to edit an existing entity |
| error-handling | Error Handling Pattern | Any container that fetches data or performs mutations |
| loading-state | Loading State Pattern | Any async data fetching |
| route-registration | Route Registration Pattern | Adding any new page to the application |
| i18n-usage | i18n Usage Pattern | Any component or container with user-facing text |
| accessibility | Accessibility Pattern | Every component and page must follow these practices |
| navigation | Navigation Pattern | Navigating between pages |

## Key Rules

- All components use MC prefix (e.g., MCButton2, MCFormTextInput)
- Form inputs require `FormikHarness` provider wrapping the form
- Import app-level components from `@msm-portal/common/component/{path}/{ComponentName}`
- Import primitives from `@moloco/moloco-cloud-react-ui`
- Use semantic color tokens, never raw hex values
- Always use `theme.mcui.spacing(n)` for spacing — never hardcoded px values
- Typography: apply via `theme.mcui.typography.{name}` in styled-components
- Use `MCButton2` not `MCButton`; use `MCFormSingleRichSelect` not `MCSelect`; use `MCCommonDialog` not `MCModal`
- Every feature follows Page → Container → Component architecture
- All user-facing text must use i18n (no hardcoded strings)
- Styled-components must use theme tokens — no inline styles, no hardcoded colors
